scope: Independent verification of the MVP-077 Obsidian/Electron fetch-binding fix, Obsidian artifact freshness, and real disposable-vault Obsidian GUI smoke.

summary.result: Passed. The shared BrokerClient binds default globalThis.fetch to globalThis while preserving injected fetchImpl, the regression test directly exercises the browser/Electron receiver requirement, the generated Obsidian artifact is fresh and contains the bound behavior, and real Obsidian GUI smoke in a disposable vault reached /v1/autocomplete, displayed ghost text, and accepted it with Tab against the mock broker.
summary.acceptance_statement: Obsidian GUI mock acceptance is now trusted for plugin load, broker POST, visible ghost text, and Tab acceptance. MVP-076-B001 is fixed by MVP-077 and independently verified here.
summary.pi_statement: A bounded request-only Obsidian GUI smoke against the pi provider also passed with exactly one POST /v1/autocomplete and visible synthetic Markdown ghost text. Tab acceptance was intentionally not repeated for pi to keep real provider calls bounded; mock already proved Tab acceptance in the same real Obsidian host.

independent_inspection.finding: BrokerClient constructor resolves default globalThis.fetch and stores resolvedFetch.bind(globalThis) only when fetchImpl is not supplied; custom fetchImpl remains unbound/injected.
Regression test replaces globalThis.fetch with a function that throws TypeError unless this === globalThis, then verifies default BrokerClient.autocomplete succeeds and calls /v1/autocomplete.
Generated artifact contains the same bound default fetch implementation, so the disposable-vault plugin uses the fixed transport path.

commands_run.result: completed before writes; showed pre-existing unrelated deleted legacy orchestration files and untracked orchestration/archive/worker paths, preserved.
passed; 11 Node tests, including BrokerClient default fetch receiver regression.
passed with no output; clients/obsidian/main.js is fresh.
passed; real Obsidian disposable-vault GUI smoke with copied plugin artifact, mock broker, CDP-driven trust/open/cursor/Tab, strict stage timeouts.
passed_request_only; exactly one pi-backed POST /v1/autocomplete from real Obsidian GUI produced visible Markdown ghost text.

obsidian.plugin_setup: Copied clients/obsidian/manifest.json, main.js, and styles.css into the disposable vault plugin directory; wrote plugin data.json with the temporary broker URL; enabled via community-plugins.json and clicked the trust prompt.

# Daily note

Today I finished measuring

tab_acceptance.note_after:
# Daily note

Today I finished measuring mock GUI smoke for the broker MVP.

pi_obsidian_gui_smoke.why_no_pi_tab: Not repeated for pi because the task asked for one bounded pi-backed Markdown request if safe; accepting would trigger a document-change follow-up request. Mock smoke already proved real Obsidian Tab acceptance after the fetch-binding fix.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Do not trust MVP-077 self-verification; independently inspect regression test and implementation shape.
evidence: clients/protocol/src/client.js lines 140-147 bind only default global fetch.
clients/protocol/test/client.test.js lines 76-99 simulates Illegal invocation unless receiver is globalThis.
npm test --prefix clients passed with 11 tests.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Real disposable-vault Obsidian GUI mock smoke verifies no failed-load toast, broker POST, visible ghost text before Tab, and note.md change after Tab.
evidence: Before-Tab screenshot and DOM rect show visible ghost text ` mock GUI smoke`.
After Tab, note.md changed to include ` mock GUI smoke`.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: If mock succeeds and safe, run one bounded pi-backed Obsidian Markdown request with synthetic note content only.
evidence: Exactly one pi-backed POST /v1/autocomplete reached the broker.
Visible ghost text ` latency and throughput` appeared in Obsidian before Tab.
Vault and note were disposable /tmp paths with synthetic Markdown only.

blockers_cleared.evidence: The real Obsidian mock smoke loaded the plugin without failed-load toast and reached /v1/autocomplete; the previous unbound Window.fetch Illegal invocation no longer blocks broker POSTs.

safety_notes: All Obsidian vaults and notes were disposable /tmp paths with synthetic Markdown content only.
The pi-backed smoke used one request-only GUI path and exactly one broker POST /v1/autocomplete.
The disposable vault copied plugin artifact files instead of symlinking the repository plugin directory, avoiding writes back into clients/obsidian/data.json.
No repository content was sent to pi; the Obsidian document URI used a vault-local note path and the context was the synthetic Markdown sentence recorded above.
Did not read prompt-buffer.md, repo tmp/, archive contents, or unrelated ~/dev directories.
remaining_notes: The pi GUI smoke proves one bounded real-provider suggestion can appear in Obsidian, but it is still a single-sample latency/quality check and not daily-use quality evidence.
Mock Obsidian GUI acceptance is sufficient to clear the fetch-binding blocker and trust Tab acceptance for this slice.
